name: page-2dadecf6
page_data_script:
if frappe.session.user == "Administrator":
    test = "admin@example.com"
else:
    test = frappe.session.user

try:
    # Get all registration documents for this user (parent or student)
    if frappe.db.exists("Registration", {"mail": test, "payment": "Not Started"}):
        # User is a parent - get all registrations for this parent
        registrations = frappe.get_all("Registration", 
                                     filters={"mail": test, "payment": "Not Started"}, 
                                     fields=["name"])
    else:
        # Check if user is a student
        student_email = test
        registrations = frappe.get_all("Registration", 
                                     filters={"student": student_email, "payment": "Not Started"}, 
                                     fields=["name"])
    
    data.registrations = []
    
    for reg in registrations:
        # Get the full document
        usr = frappe.get_doc("Registration", reg.name)
        data.registrations.append(usr)
        
        # Only process if payment is not already verified
        if usr.payment != "Verified":
            # Verify payment with Chapa
            tx_ref = usr.tx_ref
            endpoint = f"https://api.chapa.co/v1/transaction/verify/{tx_ref}"
            
            # Get the secret key
            chapa_settings = frappe.get_doc("Chapa Settings")
            secret = chapa_settings.get_password("secret_key")
            headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {secret}'}

            response = frappe.make_get_request(endpoint, headers=headers)
            
            # Log only essential information, not the entire response
            frappe.log_error(
                title=f"Chapa response for {tx_ref}", 
                message=f"Status: {response.get('status')}, Payment Status: {response.get('data', {}).get('status') if response.get('data') else 'N/A'}"
            )

            if response.get("status") == "success":
                payment_data = response.get("data", {})
                
                if payment_data.get("status") == "success":
                    # Update the corresponding Student Registration document
                    if frappe.db.exists("Student Registration", tx_ref):
                        reg_doc = frappe.get_doc("Student Registration", tx_ref)
                        reg_doc.db_set("State", "Paid")
                    
                    # Calculate dates
                    start_date = frappe.utils.getdate()
                    if usr.subscription == "3 Months": 
                        end_date = frappe.utils.add_to_date(start_date, days=90)
                    elif usr.subscription == "6 Months":
                        end_date = frappe.utils.add_to_date(start_date, days=180)
                    elif usr.subscription == "Monthly":
                        end_date = frappe.utils.add_to_date(start_date, days=30)
                    elif usr.subscription == "Semister Exam":
                        end_date = frappe.utils.add_to_date(start_date, days=180)
                    #National exams
                    #Premium exams with or boolean
                        
                        
                    else:
                        end_date = start_date  # Default to start date if no subscription specified
                    
                    # Update the Registration document using direct DB set
                    frappe.db.set_value("Registration", usr.name, {
                        "payment": "Verified",
                        "start": start_date,
                        "end": end_date
                    })
                    
                    # Commit the changes
                    frappe.db.commit()
                    
                    # Reload the document to get updated values
                    usr.reload()
                    
                    # Check if student is already enrolled in this batch
                    existing_enrollment = frappe.db.exists(
                        "LMS Batch Enrollment",
                        {
                            "member": usr.student,
                            "batch": usr.batch
                        }
                    )
                    
                    if existing_enrollment:
                        frappe.msgprint(f"Student {usr.student} is already enrolled in batch {usr.batch}!")
                    else:
                        try:
                            # Create new enrollment only if not exists
                            batch = frappe.new_doc("LMS Batch Enrollment")
                            batch.member = usr.student
                            batch.batch = usr.batch
                            
                            # Add additional required fields for LMS Batch Enrollment
                            if frappe.db.exists("User", usr.student):
                                user = frappe.get_doc("User", usr.student)
                                batch.member_name = user.full_name
                                batch.member_username = user.username
                            else:
                                # If user doesn't exist, use the student name from Registration
                                batch.member_name = getattr(usr, 'student_name', usr.student)
                                batch.member_username = usr.student
                            
                            batch.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
                            frappe.db.commit()
                            frappe.msgprint(f"Enrollment successful for {usr.student} in batch {usr.batch}!")
                        except Exception as enroll_error:
                            frappe.log_error(
                                title=f"Enrollment error for {usr.student}", 
                                message=f"Error: {str(enroll_error)[:100]}..."  # Truncate error message
                            )
                            frappe.msgprint(f"Enrollment failed for {usr.student}. Please contact support.")
                else:
                    frappe.msgprint(f"Payment failed for {usr.student}: {payment_data.get('status')}")
            else:
                frappe.msgprint(f"Verification failed for {usr.student}: {response.get('message')}")
        else:
            frappe.msgprint(f"Payment already verified for {usr.student}")
            # Even if payment is already verified, check if enrollment exists
            existing_enrollment = frappe.db.exists(
                "LMS Batch Enrollment",
                {
                    "member": usr.student,
                    "batch": usr.batch
                }
            )
            
            if not existing_enrollment:
                try:
                    # Create enrollment if it doesn't exist
                    batch = frappe.new_doc("LMS Batch Enrollment")
                    batch.member = usr.student
                    batch.batch = usr.batch
                    
                    # Add additional required fields for LMS Batch Enrollment
                    if frappe.db.exists("User", usr.student):
                        user = frappe.get_doc("User", usr.student)
                        batch.member_name = user.full_name
                        batch.member_username = user.username
                    else:
                        # If user doesn't exist, use the student name from Registration
                        batch.member_name = getattr(usr, 'student_name', usr.student)
                        batch.member_username = usr.student
                    
                    batch.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
                    frappe.db.commit()
                    frappe.msgprint(f"Enrollment created for already verified payment for {usr.student}!")
                except Exception as enroll_error:
                    frappe.log_error(
                        title=f"Enrollment error for {usr.student}", 
                        message=f"Error: {str(enroll_error)[:100]}..."  # Truncate error message
                    )
                    frappe.msgprint(f"Enrollment failed for {usr.student}. Please contact support.")

except Exception as e:
    frappe.log_error(
        title="Error in payment verification", 
        message=f"Error: {str(e)[:100]}..."  # Truncate error message
    )
    frappe.msgprint("An error occurred during payment verification. Please contact support.")

page_data_script:
if frappe.session.user == "Administrator": user = "hmdzabu@gmail.com" #user = frappe.session.user else: user = frappe.session.user fname = frappe.get_fullname() #check roles grand_total = 0 data.grand_total = f"{grand_total} birr" role = frappe.get_doc("User", user,["role_profile_name"]) #data.role = role #if role.role_profile_name == "Parent": if role.role_profile_name == "Gobez Student": data.expired= frappe.get_all( 'Registration', filters={ 'payment': 'To Renew', 'student':user }, fields=["*"] ) allexpired =data.expired else: data.expired= frappe.get_all( 'Registration', filters={ 'payment': 'To Renew', 'mail':user }, fields=["*"] ) allexpired =data.expired length = len(data.expired) data.length = length data.uname =f"Hi, {fname}" if length >0: allexpired= frappe.get_all( 'Registration', filters={ 'payment': 'To Renew', 'mail':user }, fields=["*"] ) for total in allexpired: price = int(total.total) grand_total = grand_total+price data.grand_total = f"{grand_total} birr" random_string = frappe.utils.generate_hash("token")[:16] data.random_string = random_string data.umessage = f""" You have {length} subscription(s) expired.
Your total is {grand_total} birr to renew all. Click the button below to renew all, or click on a specific subscription to renew individually. Happy learning. """ for relative_total in data.expired: frappe.db.set_value("Registration",relative_total.name,"relative_total",grand_total) frappe.db.set_value("Registration",relative_total.name,"tx_ref_total",random_string) #relative_total.relative_total = grand_total #relative_total.save(ignore_permissions=True) frappe.db.commit() #random_string = secrets.token_hex(8) #data.tx_ref=allexpired.name try: endpoint = "https://api.chapa.co/v1/transaction/initialize" datas = { "amount": grand_total, "currency": "ETB", "tx_ref":random_string, "first_name": frappe.session.user_fullname, "callback_url": "https://lms.gobezacademy.com/gobez/gobez/checkout-grand", "return_url": "https://lms.gobezacademy.com/gobez/verify-and-re-enroll" } # Check if Chapa Settings exists if frappe.db.exists("DocType", "Chapa Settings"): secret = frappe.get_doc("Chapa Settings").get_password("secret_key") headers = { 'Authorization': f'Bearer {secret}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } response = frappe.make_post_request(endpoint,headers=headers,data=json.dumps(datas)) if response.get("status") == "success": checkout_url = response["data"].get("checkout_url") #usr.relative_total = random_string #data.check={checkout_url} #data.grand_total = grand_total data.checko=checkout_url except Exception as e: frappe.throw(f"Payment initialization failed: {str(e)}")

name: page-27ab7fec

page_data_script:
if frappe.session.user == "Administrator":
    user = "seyd@gmail.com"
else:
    user = frappe.session.user

fname = frappe.get_fullname()
role = frappe.get_doc("User", user, ["role_profile_name"])
today = frappe.utils.getdate()
data.today

if role.role_profile_name == "Gobez Student":
    data.enrolled = frappe.get_list(
        'Registration',
        filters={
            'payment': ["!=", "Not Started"],
            'mail': user
            
        },
        fields=["*"]
    )
    
    # Get all progress for the student 
    all_progress = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Course Progress',
        filters={'member': user},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    # Get all quiz submissions for the student
    all_quiz_submissions = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Quiz Submission',
        filters={'member': user},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    # Get all activity logs for the student
    all_activities = frappe.get_all(
        'Activity Log',
        filters={'user': user},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    data.uname = f"Hi, {fname} your learning summary"
    
    # Calculate daily progress (today)
    daily_progress = [p for p in all_progress if frappe.utils.getdate(p.modified) == today]
    daily_quiz = [q for q in all_quiz_submissions if frappe.utils.getdate(q.modified) == today]
    daily_activity = [a for a in all_activities if frappe.utils.getdate(a.modified) == today]
    
    # Calculate weekly progress (current week)
    weekday = today.weekday()
    start_of_week = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -weekday)
    end_of_week = frappe.utils.add_days(start_of_week, 6)
    weekly_progress = [p for p in all_progress if start_of_week <= frappe.utils.getdate(p.modified) <= end_of_week]
    weekly_quiz = [q for q in all_quiz_submissions if start_of_week <= frappe.utils.getdate(q.modified) <= end_of_week]
    weekly_activity = [a for a in all_activities if start_of_week <= frappe.utils.getdate(a.modified) <= end_of_week]
    
    # Calculate monthly progress (current month)
    monthly_progress = [p for p in all_progress if frappe.utils.get_first_day(today) <= frappe.utils.getdate(p.modified) <= frappe.utils.get_last_day(today)]
    monthly_quiz = [q for q in all_quiz_submissions if frappe.utils.get_first_day(today) <= frappe.utils.getdate(q.modified) <= frappe.utils.get_last_day(today)]
    monthly_activity = [a for a in all_activities if frappe.utils.get_first_day(today) <= frappe.utils.getdate(a.modified) <= frappe.utils.get_last_day(today)]
    
    # Summary counts for tiles - Course Progress
    data.daily_count = len(daily_progress)
    data.weekly_count = len(weekly_progress)
    data.monthly_count = len(monthly_progress)
    data.total_count = len(all_progress)
    
    data.daily_progress = f"{data.daily_count} lessons completed today!"
    data.weekly_progress = f"{data.weekly_count} lessons completed this week!"
    data.monthly_progress = f"{data.monthly_count} lessons completed this month!"
    data.total_progress = f"{data.total_count} total lessons completed"
    
    # Quiz Submission counts
    data.daily_quiz_count = len(daily_quiz)
    data.weekly_quiz_count = len(weekly_quiz)
    data.monthly_quiz_count = len(monthly_quiz)
    data.total_quiz_count = len(all_quiz_submissions)
    
    data.daily_quiz = f"{data.daily_quiz_count} quizzes submitted today!"
    data.weekly_quiz = f"{data.weekly_quiz_count} quizzes submitted this week!"
    data.monthly_quiz = f"{data.monthly_quiz_count} quizzes submitted this month!"
    data.total_quiz = f"{data.total_quiz_count} total quizzes submitted"
    
    # Activity Log counts
    data.daily_activity_count = len(daily_activity)
    data.weekly_activity_count = len(weekly_activity)
    data.monthly_activity_count = len(monthly_activity)
    data.total_activity_count = len(all_activities)
    
    data.daily_activity = f"{data.daily_activity_count} activities today!"
    data.weekly_activity = f"{data.weekly_activity_count} activities this week!"
    data.monthly_activity = f"{data.monthly_activity_count} activities this month!"
    data.total_activity = f"{data.total_activity_count} total activities"

elif role.role_profile_name == "Parent":
    data.enrolled = frappe.get_all(
        'Registration',
        filters={
            'payment': ["=", "Not Started"],
            'mail': user
        },
        fields=["*"]
    )
    
    data.uname = f"Hi, {fname} - Children's Learning Summary"
    
    children = [student.student for student in data.enrolled]
    
    # Initialize counters for Course Progress
    daily_count = 0
    weekly_count = 0
    monthly_count = 0
    total_count = 0
    
    # Initialize counters for Quiz Submissions
    daily_quiz_count = 0
    weekly_quiz_count = 0
    monthly_quiz_count = 0
    total_quiz_count = 0
    
    # Initialize counters for Activity Logs
    daily_activity_count = 0
    weekly_activity_count = 0
    monthly_activity_count = 0
    total_activity_count = 0
    
    # Get progress for all children
    for child in children:
        # Course Progress
        child_progress = frappe.get_all(
            'LMS Course Progress',
            filters={'member': child},
            fields=["modified"]
        )
        
        total_count = len(child_progress) + total_count
        
        # Quiz Submissions
        child_quiz = frappe.get_all(
            'LMS Quiz Submission',
            filters={'member': child},
            fields=["modified"]
        )
        
        total_quiz_count = len(child_quiz) + total_quiz_count
        
        # Activity Logs
        child_activity = frappe.get_all(
            'Activity Log',
            filters={'user': child},
            fields=["modified"]
        )
        
        total_activity_count = len(child_activity) + total_activity_count
        
        # Count daily progress - Course Progress
        for p in child_progress:
            if frappe.utils.getdate(p.modified) == today:
                daily_count = daily_count + 1
        
        # Count daily progress - Quiz Submissions
        for q in child_quiz:
            if frappe.utils.getdate(q.modified) == today:
                daily_quiz_count = daily_quiz_count + 1
        
        # Count daily progress - Activity Logs
        for a in child_activity:
            if frappe.utils.getdate(a.modified) == today:
                daily_activity_count = daily_activity_count + 1
        
        # Count weekly progress - Course Progress
        weekday = today.weekday()
        start_of_week = frappe.utils.add_days(today, -weekday)
        end_of_week = frappe.utils.add_days(start_of_week, 6)
        
        for p in child_progress:
            progress_date = frappe.utils.getdate(p.modified)
            if start_of_week <= progress_date <= end_of_week:
                weekly_count = weekly_count + 1
        
        # Count weekly progress - Quiz Submissions
        for q in child_quiz:
            quiz_date = frappe.utils.getdate(q.modified)
            if start_of_week <= quiz_date <= end_of_week:
                weekly_quiz_count = weekly_quiz_count + 1
        
        # Count weekly progress - Activity Logs
        for a in child_activity:
            activity_date = frappe.utils.getdate(a.modified)
            if start_of_week <= activity_date <= end_of_week:
                weekly_activity_count = weekly_activity_count + 1
        
        # Count monthly progress - Course Progress
        first_day = frappe.utils.get_first_day(today)
        last_day = frappe.utils.get_last_day(today)
        
        for p in child_progress:
            progress_date = frappe.utils.getdate(p.modified)
            if first_day <= progress_date <= last_day:
                monthly_count = monthly_count + 1
        
        # Count monthly progress - Quiz Submissions
        for q in child_quiz:
            quiz_date = frappe.utils.getdate(q.modified)
            if first_day <= quiz_date <= last_day:
                monthly_quiz_count = monthly_quiz_count + 1
        
        # Count monthly progress - Activity Logs
        for a in child_activity:
            activity_date = frappe.utils.getdate(a.modified)
            if first_day <= activity_date <= last_day:
                monthly_activity_count = monthly_activity_count + 1
    
    # Summary counts for tiles - Course Progress
    data.daily_count = daily_count
    data.weekly_count = weekly_count
    data.monthly_count = monthly_count
    data.total_count = total_count
    
    data.daily_progress = f"{daily_count} lessons completed by all children today!"
    data.weekly_progress = f"{weekly_count} lessons completed this week!"
    data.monthly_progress = f"{monthly_count} lessons completed this month!"
    data.total_progress = f"{total_count} total lessons completed by all children"
    
    # Quiz Submission counts
    data.daily_quiz_count = daily_quiz_count
    data.weekly_quiz_count = weekly_quiz_count
    data.monthly_quiz_count = monthly_quiz_count
    data.total_quiz_count = total_quiz_count
    
    data.daily_quiz = f"{daily_quiz_count} quizzes submitted by all children today!"
    data.weekly_quiz = f"{weekly_quiz_count} quizzes submitted this week!"
    data.monthly_quiz = f"{monthly_quiz_count} quizzes submitted this month!"
    data.total_quiz = f"{total_quiz_count} total quizzes submitted by all children"
    
    # Activity Log counts
    data.daily_activity_count = daily_activity_count
    data.weekly_activity_count = weekly_activity_count
    data.monthly_activity_count = monthly_activity_count
    data.total_activity_count = total_activity_count
    
    data.daily_activity = f"{daily_activity_count} activities by all children today!"
    data.weekly_activity = f"{weekly_activity_count} activities this week!"
    data.monthly_activity = f"{monthly_activity_count} activities this month!"
    data.total_activity = f"{total_activity_count} total activities by all children"

else:
    data.enrolled = frappe.get_all(
        'Registration',
        filters={
            'payment': ["=", "Not Started"],

name: page-dc351e77
page_data_script:
if frappe.session.user == "Administrator":
    user ="hmdzabu@gmail.com" 
    #user = frappe.session.user

else:
    user = frappe.session.user

#user = frappe.session.user

#data.t =1
doc = frappe.get_doc("User",user)
data.user = f"Dear, {frappe.get_fullname()}"

if doc.role_profile_name =="Student Gobez":

    data.progress = frappe.db.get_all("Registration", {"student":user,"payment":"verified"},["student","student_name","grade"])
    progress =len(data.progress)
    
    data.p =progress
    data.expired = frappe.db.get_all("Registration", {"student":user,"payment":"To Renew",},["student","subscription","grade","total","end","student_name"])
    
    expired = len(data.expired)
    #data.expired_length = expired
    
    data.unpaid= frappe.db.get_all("Registration", {"student":user,"payment":"Not Started"},["student","subscription","grade","total","student_name"]) 
    unpaid = len(data.unpaid)
    if progress > 0:
        data.progress_header = "Progress Reports"
        ph = True
    if expired > 0:
        data.expired_header = "Expired Subscription"
        data.eh = True
    if unpaid > 0:
        data.unpaid_header = "Unpaid Registration" 
        data.uh = True
else:
    data.progress = frappe.db.get_all("Registration", {"mail":user,"payment":"verified"},["student","student_name","grade"])
    progress =len(data.progress)
    data.p =progress
    data.expired = frappe.db.get_all("Registration", {"mail":user,"payment":"To Renew",},["student","subscription","grade","total","end","student_name"])
    expired = len(data.expired)
    data.e = expired
    data.unpaid= frappe.db.get_all("Registration", {"mail":user,"payment":"Not Started"},["student","subscription","grade","total","student_name"]) 
    unpaid = len(data.unpaid)
    data.u = unpaid
    if progress > 0:
        data.progress_header = "Progress Reports"
    if expired > 0:
        data.expired_header = "Expired Subscription"
    if unpaid > 0:
        data.unpaid_header = "Unpaid Registration"

name: page-0c6f5793
page_data_script:
user =frappe.form_dict.student or "courser@gobezacademy.com"
#user = frappe.session.user
today = frappe.utils.get_datetime()
data.today = today
#today_date = frappe.utils.getdate(today())
#data.today_date =today_date
#week_start = today - frappe.utils.datetime.timedelta(days=today.weekday())

#last_week_end = add_to_date(last_week_start, days=6)


if user !=None:
    fname = frappe.get_fullname(user)
    role = frappe.get_doc("User", user, ["role_profile_name"])
    today = frappe.utils.now_datetime()
    today_date = frappe.utils.add_to_date(today, days=-1)
    data.today_date =today_date
    last_week = frappe.utils.add_to_date(today, days=-7)
    data.last_week=last_week
    
    last_month = frappe.utils.add_to_date(today, months=-1)
    data.last_month = last_month
    
    
        
    # Get all progress for the student 
    data.all_progress = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Course Progress',
        filters={'member': user,"modified":['between',[today_date,today]]},
        fields=["*"]
    )
    
    #week
    data.all_progress_week = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Course Progress',
        filters={'member': user,"modified":["between",[last_week,today]]},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    #month
    data.all_progress_month = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Course Progress',
        filters={'member': user, "modified":["between",[last_month,today]]},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    # Get all quiz submissions for the student
    data.all_quiz_submissions = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Quiz Submission',
        filters={'member': user,"modified":['between',[today_date,today]]},
        fields=["*"]
    )
    
    #week
    data.all_quiz_submissions_week = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Quiz Submission',
        filters={'member': user,"modified":["between",[last_week,today]]},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    #month
    data.all_quiz_submissions_month = frappe.get_all(
        'LMS Quiz Submission',
        filters={'member': user,"modified":["between",[last_month,today]]},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    # Get all activity logs for the student
    data.all_activities = frappe.get_all(
        'Activity Log',
        filters={'user': user,"modified":['between',[today_date,today]]},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    #week
    data.all_activities_week = frappe.get_all(
        'Activity Log',
        filters={'user': user,"modified":["between",[last_week,today]]},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    #month
    data.all_activities_month = frappe.get_all(
        'Activity Log',
        filters={'user': user,"modified":["between",[last_month,today]]},
        fields=["modified"]
    )
    
    data.uname = f"{fname}'s learning summary"
    data.progress_length = len(data.all_progress)
    data.quiz_length = len(data.all_quiz_submissions)
    data.activities_length = len(data.all_activities)
    
    data.progress_month = len(data.all_progress_month)
    data.quiz_month = len(data.all_quiz_submissions_month)
    data.activities_month = len(data.all_activities_month)
    
    data.progress_week = len(data.all_progress_week)
    data.quiz_week = len(data.all_quiz_submissions_week)
    data.activities_week = len(data.all_activities_week)

name: page-71f25363
page_data_script:
test = frappe.session.user



#test = "maj@afkar.com"

usr = frappe.get_doc("Registration",{"mail":test})

if usr.mail == usr.student:
    frappe.msgprint("Dear Student")
    data.usr_type = [frappe.get_doc("Student Registration",{"student_email":test})]
else:
    frappe.msgprint("Dear Parent")
    data.usr_type = [frappe.get_doc("Student Registration",{"parent_email":test})]
    #data.usr_type =[usr]








usr = frappe.get_doc("Registration",{"mail":test})
tx_ref = usr.tx_ref
data.tx=tx_ref

# Verify payment with Chapa
endpoint = f"https://api.chapa.co/v1/transaction/verify/{tx_ref}"
secret = frappe.get_doc("Chapa Settings").get_password("secret_key")
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {secret}'}


response = frappe.make_get_request(endpoint, headers=headers)
#print(response.get("status"))
    #response.raise_for_status()  # Raise error for HTTP failures
#except Exception as e:
    #frappe.log_error(f"Chapa API Error: {str(e)}")
    #frappe.throw("Payment verification failed. Please try again later.")

# Parse and validate response
if response.get("status") == "success":
    payment_data = response.get("data", {})
    
    if payment_data.get("status") == "success":
        # Update registration document
        reg_doc = frappe.get_doc("Student Registration", tx_ref)
        
        # Update payment details
        reg_doc.db_set({
            "State": "Paid"
            #"amount_paid": payment_data.get("amount"),
            #"payment_reference": payment_data.get("reference"),
            #"payment_date": payment_data.get("created_at"),
            #"chapa_response": frappe.as_json(response)  # Store full response for reference
        })
        
        frappe.db.commit()
        
       
            
       
        batch = frappe.new_doc("LMS Batch Enrollment")
        batch.member = usr.student
        batch.batch = reg_doc.grade
        batch.save(ignore_permissions=True)
       
    
        frappe.msgprint("Payment verified successfully!")
        #student_mail = usr.student
        data.reg = [frappe.get_doc("Student Registration", tx_ref)]
    else:
        frappe.msgprint(f"Payment failed: {payment_data.get('status')}")
else:
    frappe.msgprint(f"Verification failed: {response.get('message')}")

name: page-a150b517
page_data_script:
# Data Script for Gobez Portal - Fixed Version
#user = frappe.session.user
user ="1hmdzabu@gmail.com"

result = {"user_type": None, "data": [], "debug": {"user": user, "roles": [], "error": None}}

try:
    # Get user roles
    user_doc = frappe.get_doc("User", user)
    user_roles = [role.role for role in user_doc.roles]
    result["debug"]["roles"] = user_roles
    data.user_roles = user_roles  # Expose user roles
    
    # Check if user has Parent or LMS Student role
    if "Parent" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "Parent"
        # Get all student registrations where parent_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"parent_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name", "student_name", "student_email", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Organize data by child
        children = {}
        for reg in registrations:
            if reg.student_email not in children:
                children[reg.student_email] = {
                    "student_name": reg.student_name,
                    "student_email": reg.student_email,
                    "subscriptions": []
                }
            
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                except Exception as e:
                    batch_name = reg.grade
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            children[reg.student_email]["subscriptions"].append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        result["data"] = list(children.values())
        data.children = list(children.values())  # Expose children data
    
    elif "LMS Student" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "LMS Student"
        # Get all student registrations where student_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"student_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Get details for each registration
        subscriptions = []
        for reg in registrations:
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            courses = []
            
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                    
                    # Get courses from the Batch Course child table
                    try:
                        if batch.courses:
                            for batch_course in batch.courses:
                                course = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", batch_course.course)
                                
                                # Get the latest progress record for this course
                                progress_records = frappe.get_all(
                                    "LMS Course Progress",
                                    filters={"member": user, "course": course.name},
                                    fields=["status"],
                                    order_by="creation desc",
                                    limit=1
                                )
                                
                                # Map status to progress percentage
                                status_to_progress = {
                                    "Complete": 100,
                                    "Partially Complete": 50,
                                    "Incomplete": 0
                                }
                                
                                progress_value = 0
                                if progress_records:
                                    status = progress_records[0].get("status", "Incomplete")
                                    progress_value = status_to_progress.get(status, 0)
                                
                                courses.append({
                                    "name": course.name,
                                    "title": course.title,
                                    "description": course.description or "",
                                    "progress": progress_value
                                })
                    except:
                        # If batch doesn't have a courses attribute, it's okay
                        pass
                except Exception as e:
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            subscriptions.append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "courses": courses,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        result["data"] = subscriptions
        data.subscriptions = subscriptions  # Expose subscriptions
        
    else:
        result["debug"]["error"] = "User does not have Parent or LMS Student role"
        
except Exception as e:
    result["debug"]["error"] = str(e)

# Expose the final result
data.result = result

# Return the result for the data script
result

name: page-54635635
page_data_script:
# Data Script for Gobez Portal - Enhanced with Analytics  
#user = frappe.session.user 
user = "1hmdzabu@gmail.com"

result = {
    "user_type": None, 
    "data": [],
    "analytics": {
        "total_courses": 0,
        "completed_courses": 0,
        "in_progress_courses": 0,
        "not_started_courses": 0,
        "overall_progress": 0,
        "recent_activity": []
    },
    "achievements": [],
    "certificates": [],
    "debug": {"user": user, "roles": [], "error": None}
}

try:
    # Get user roles
    user_doc = frappe.get_doc("User", user)
    data.profile = user_doc.first_name
    user_roles = [role.role for role in user_doc.roles]
    result["debug"]["roles"] = user_roles
    data.user_roles = user_roles  # Expose user roles
    
    # Check if user has Parent or LMS Student role
    if "Parent" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "Parent"
        # Get all student registrations where parent_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"parent_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name","parent_name", "student_name", "student_email", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Organize data by child
        children = {}
        for reg in registrations:
            if reg.student_email not in children:
                children[reg.student_email] = {
                    "student_name": reg.student_name,
                    "student_email": reg.student_email,
                    "subscriptions": [],
                    "analytics": {
                        "total_courses": 0,
                        "completed_courses": 0,
                        "in_progress_courses": 0,
                        "not_started_courses": 0,
                        "overall_progress": 0
                    }
                }
            
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            courses = []
            
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                    
                    # Get courses from the Batch Course child table
                    try:
                        if batch.courses:
                            for batch_course in batch.courses:
                                course = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", batch_course.course)
                                
                                # Get the latest progress record for this course
                                progress_records = frappe.get_all(
                                    "LMS Course Progress",
                                    filters={"member": user, "course": course.name},
                                    fields=["status"],
                                    order_by="creation desc",
                                    limit=1
                                )
                                
                                # Map status to progress percentage
                                status_to_progress = {
                                    "Complete": 100,
                                    "Partially Complete": 50,
                                    "Incomplete": 0
                                }
                                
                                progress_value = 0
                                if progress_records:
                                    status = progress_records[0].get("status", "Incomplete")
                                    progress_value = status_to_progress.get(status, 0)
                                
                                # Update analytics (without augmented assignment)
                                child_analytics = children[reg.student_email]["analytics"]
                                child_analytics["total_courses"] = child_analytics["total_courses"] + 1
                                if progress_value == 100:
                                    child_analytics["completed_courses"] = child_analytics["completed_courses"] + 1
                                elif progress_value > 0:
                                    child_analytics["in_progress_courses"] = child_analytics["in_progress_courses"] + 1
                                else:
                                    child_analytics["not_started_courses"] = child_analytics["not_started_courses"] + 1
                                
                                courses.append({
                                    "name": course.name,
                                    "title": course.title,
                                    "description": course.description or "",
                                    "progress": progress_value,
                                    "completed": progress_value == 100
                                })
                    except:
                        # If batch doesn't have a courses attribute, it's okay
                        pass
                except Exception as e:
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            children[reg.student_email]["subscriptions"].append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "courses": courses,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        # Calculate overall progress for each child
        for child_email, child_data in children.items():
            total = child_data["analytics"]["total_courses"]
            if total > 0:
                completed = child_data["analytics"]["completed_courses"]
                in_progress = child_data["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"]
                # Weight completed as 100%, in progress as 50%
                child_data["analytics"]["overall_progress"] = round(((completed * 100) + (in_progress * 50)) / total)
        
        result["data"] = list(children.values())
        data.children = list(children.values())  # Expose children data
    
    elif "LMS Student" in user_roles:
        result["user_type"] = "LMS Student"
        # Get all student registrations where student_email matches current user
        registrations = frappe.get_all(
            "Student Registration",
            filters={"student_email": user, "state": ["in", ["Paid", "Renewed"]]},
            fields=["name","student_name", "grade", "subscription", "state", "total"]
        )
        data.registrations = registrations  # Expose registrations
        result["debug"]["registrations_found"] = len(registrations)
        
        # Get details for each registration
        subscriptions = []
        for reg in registrations:
            # Get batch details
            batch_name = reg.grade  # Default to grade ID
            courses = []
            
            if reg.grade:
                try:
                    batch = frappe.get_doc("LMS Batch", reg.grade)
                    batch_name = batch.title
                    
                    # Get courses from the Batch Course child table
                    try:
                        if batch.courses:
                            for batch_course in batch.courses:
                                course = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", batch_course.course)
                                
                                # Get the latest progress record for this course
                                progress_records = frappe.get_all(
                                    "LMS Course Progress",
                                    filters={"member": user, "course": course.name},
                                    fields=["status"],
                                    order_by="creation desc",
                                    limit=1
                                )
                                
                                # Map status to progress percentage
                                status_to_progress = {
                                    "Complete": 100,
                                    "Partially Complete": 50,
                                    "Incomplete": 0
                                }
                                
                                progress_value = 0
                                if progress_records:
                                    status = progress_records[0].get("status", "Incomplete")
                                    progress_value = status_to_progress.get(status, 0)
                                
                                # Update analytics (without augmented assignment)
                                result["analytics"]["total_courses"] = result["analytics"]["total_courses"] + 1
                                if progress_value == 100:
                                    result["analytics"]["completed_courses"] = result["analytics"]["completed_courses"] + 1
                                    # Add to achievements
                                    result["achievements"].append({
                                        "course": course.name,
                                        "title": course.title,
                                        "completed_date": progress_records[0].get("creation"),
                                        "type": "course_completion"
                                    })
                                elif progress_value > 0:
                                    result["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"] = result["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"] + 1
                                else:
                                    result["analytics"]["not_started_courses"] = result["analytics"]["not_started_courses"] + 1
                                
                                courses.append({
                                    "name": course.name,
                                    "title": course.title,
                                    "description": course.description or "",
                                    "progress": progress_value,
                                    "completed": progress_value == 100
                                })
                    except:
                        # If batch doesn't have a courses attribute, it's okay
                        pass
                except Exception as e:
                    result["debug"]["batch_error"] = str(e)
            
            subscriptions.append({
                "registration": reg.name,
                "batch": reg.grade,
                "batch_name": batch_name,
                "courses": courses,
                "subscription": reg.subscription,
                "state": reg.state,
                "amount": reg.total
            })
        
        # Calculate overall progress
        total = result["analytics"]["total_courses"]
        if total > 0:
            completed = result["analytics"]["completed_courses"]
            in_progress = result["analytics"]["in_progress_courses"]
            # Weight completed as 100%, in progress as 50%
            result["analytics"]["overall_progress"] = round(((completed * 100) + (in_progress * 50)) / total)
        
        result["data"] = subscriptions
        data.subscriptions = subscriptions  # Expose subscriptions
        
        # Get recent activity
        recent_activity = frappe.get_all(
            "LMS Course Progress",
            filters={"member": user},
            fields=["course", "status", "creation"],
            order_by="creation desc",
            limit=10
        )
        
        for activity in recent_activity:
            course_title = activity.course
            try:
                course_doc = frappe.get_doc("LMS Course", activity.course)
                course_title = course_doc.title
            except:
                pass
                
            result["analytics"]["recent_activity"].append({
                "course": activity.course,
                "course_title": course_title,
                "status": activity.status,
                "date": activity.creation
            })
        
        # Check for certificates for completed courses
        # Replace the certificate checking section with this updated code:

        # Check for certificates for completed courses
        for achievement in result["achievements"]:
            # Check if certificate already exists
            try:
                certificates = frappe.get_all(
                    "LMS Certificate",
                    filters={"student": user, "course": achievement["course"]},
                    fields=["name", "issue_date", "certificate_url"]
                )
            except Exception as e:
                # If certificate_url field doesn't exist, try without it
                try:
                    certificates = frappe.get_all(
                        "LMS Certificate",
                        filters={"student": user, "course": achievement["course"]},
                        fields=["name", "issue_date"]
                    )
                    # Add empty certificate_url to each certificate
                    for cert in certificates:
                        cert["certificate_url"] = None
                except Exception as e2:
                    certificates = []
                    result["debug"]["certificate_error"] = str(e2)
            
            if certificates:
                achievement["certificate"] = certificates[0]
                result["certificates"].append(certificates[0])
            else:
                # Certificate doesn't exist yet, but course is completed
                achievement["certificate_eligible"] = True
        
    else:
        result["debug"]["error"] = "User does not have Parent or LMS Student role"
        
except Exception as e:
    result["debug"]["error"] = str(e)

# Expose the final result
data.result = result

# Return the result for the data script
result

page_data_script:
full_name=frappe.get_fullname()
data.full_name = f"Hello {full_name}" 
data.referral = frappe.get_doc("Referral",frappe.session.user)
#referral = frappe.get_doc("Referral",frappe.session.user)
referral=frappe.get_all("Referred User", filters={"parent":frappe.session.user,"commission":"Pending"}, fields=["*"]) 
#data.every_referral =  [referral.referred]
  
#data.every_referral =  referral.referred

data.every_referral =  referral

every_referral =  referral
referral_count =len(every_referral)
if referral_count ==0:
  data.users_referred = "No new referrals! Please invite more students and get commission!"
elif referral_count ==1:
  data.users_referred = f"{referral_count} New referral. Keep sharing to get more commission!"
  total=frappe.get_all("Referred User", filters={"parent":frappe.session.user,"commission":"Pending"}, fields=["sum(amount)*10/100 as total"]) 
  data.commission= f"Total Commission to collected is {total[0].total} Birr. Click the button below to request your payment."
else:
  data.users_referred = f"{referral_count} New referrals. Keep sharing to get more commission!"
  total=frappe.get_all("Referred User", filters={"parent":frappe.session.user,"commission":"Pending"}, fields=["sum(amount)*10/100 as total"])
  data.commission= f"Total Commission to collected is {total[0].total} Birr. Click the button below to request your payment."
#data.total_commission = (total.total * 10)/100

#data.commission= f"Total Commission to collected is {total[0].total} Birr. Click the button below to request your payment."

name: page-df389c42
page_data_script:
#data.dtim =frappe.utils.get_datetime()


grades = frappe.get_all("LMS Batch",{"paid_grade":1}, ["*"], order_by="name asc")
data.grades =grades
subscription = frappe.get_all("Subscription",["*"])
data.subscription = subscription
  
  
vld = frappe.get_doc("Referral",frappe.session.user)
rcode = vld.referred_by_code
data.rcode =rcode
fullname = frappe.get_fullname()
  
  
if not frappe.form_dict.code:
  code = f"Hello {frappe.session.user}"
  data.code = code
  data.fullname=f"Hello {fullname}"
  
  
  

  
    

  

  	
elif not rcode and frappe.form_dict.code:
  data.fullname=f"Hello {fullname}"
  
  code = frappe.form_dict.code
  data.code = code
  doc = frappe.get_doc("Referral", {"code":code})
  data.doc = doc
  #data.chek = doc.code
  child_doc = frappe.new_doc("Referred User")
  child_doc.parent = doc.name
  child_doc.parentfield = "referred"
  child_doc.parenttype = "Referral"
  child_doc.referred_user = frappe.session.user  # Replace with actual field names
  child_doc.date = frappe.utils.get_datetime()
  #child_doc.amount = "100"
  child_doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)
  docuser =frappe.get_doc("Referral",frappe.session.user)
  data.docuser =docuser
  docuser.referred_by_code =code
  docuser.save(ignore_permissions=True)
  #if docuser.referred_by_code == None:
  frappe.db.set_value("Referral", frappe.session.user, {
                        "referred_by_code": code,
                        "referred_user": 1
                        
                    })
                    
                    # Commit the changes
  frappe.db.commit()
                    
                    # Reload the document to get updated values
  docuser.reload()

elif rcode:
  data.fullname=f"Hello {fullname}"
  data.code = f"You already used another referral code {rcode}!"

name: page-4d717030
page_data_script:
#data.dtim = frappe.utils.get_datetime()
subscriptions = frappe.get_all("Subscription", ["*"])

grades = frappe.get_all("LMS Batch", {"paid_grade": 1}, ["*"], order_by="name asc")

vld = frappe.get_doc("Referral", frappe.session.user)
rcode = vld.referred_by_code
data.rcode = rcode
fullname = frappe.get_fullname()

if not frappe.form_dict.code:
    code = f"Hello {frappe.session.user}"
  	#rfcode="solo"
    data.code = code
    data.fullname = f"Hello {fullname}"
    
elif not rcode and frappe.form_dict.code:
    data.fullname = f"Hello {fullname}"
    code = frappe.form_dict.code
    data.code = code
    doc = frappe.get_doc("Referral", {"code": code})
    data.doc = doc
    
    # Add referred user
    child_doc = frappe.new_doc("Referred User")
    child_doc.parent = doc.name
    child_doc.parentfield = "referred"
    child_doc.parenttype = "Referral"
    child_doc.referred_user = frappe.session.user
    child_doc.date = frappe.utils.get_datetime()
    child_doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)
    
    # Update current user's referral code
    frappe.db.set_value("Referral", frappe.session.user, {
        "referred_by_code": code,
        "referred_user": 1
    })
    frappe.db.commit()
    
elif rcode:
    data.fullname = f"Hello {fullname}"
    data.code = f"You already used another referral code {rcode}!"

# Create combined flat list with grade info and links
links = []
referral_code = data.code if isinstance(data.code, str) and not data.code.startswith("Hello") and not data.code.startswith("You already") else None

for grade in grades:
    for subscription in subscriptions:
        link = f"/register-now/new?subscription={subscription['name']}&grade={grade['name']}"
        if referral_code:
            link += f"&referral_code={referral_code}"
        
        # Create a combined item with grade info and link
        links.append({
            "grade_name": grade['name'],
            "grade_title": grade.get('title', ''),
            "grade_description": grade.get('description', ''),
            "subscription_name": subscription['name'],
          	"subscription_image": subscription.get('subscription_image'),
            "subscription_type": subscription.get('type', ''),
            "subscription_price": f"{subscription.get('price', 0)-subscription.get('price', 0)*subscription.get('referral_discount', 0)/100} ETB",
          	
            "link": link
        })

data.links = links
